question: Based on the chart of website visitors over the 14 days, which statement about the beginning and end of the period is most accurate?

options.A: Total visitors were higher during the first 7 days than during the last 7 days.
options.B: Total visitors were higher during the last 7 days than during the first 7 days.
options.C: Visitor numbers were roughly the same on every day.
options.D: Visitor numbers steadily increased from the start to the end of the period.

explanation: The x‑axis order has been scrambled: the bars are not shown in true chronological sequence. If you reorder the days from Day 1 to Day 14 and sum the first and last 7 days, you see that the first segment actually has the greater total. Judging only from the apparent left‑to‑right pattern would give the wrong conclusion.
